query:
SELECT COLUMN_NAME
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
  AND TABLE_NAME = 'engineer_daily_productivity'
ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
  AND TABLE_NAME = 'engineer_daily_productivity'
ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
